presentation.description: I specialise in building fast, accessible, and carefully designed web experiences. I work with React, Vite, and modern APIs. I am interested in performance and scalability in projects.

experience1.description: Development of an automated booking and payment system via WhatsApp for the barbershop “El Bigote Siberiano”, storing data in Google services such as Sheets and Calendar. Project paused during implementation of Mercado Pago API at the client's request.
achievements: I designed and developed an end-to-end booking ecosystem integrating the WhatsApp Business API, Make, and Google Workspace, automating the schedule flow and reducing the barbershop's administrative burden.
I implemented a natural language processing engine in TypeScript to normalise dates and times to the ISO 8601 format (DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm:ss).

I improved the success rate of reservations by migrating from an unstable generative AI model to a deterministic logical flow system, eliminating misinterpretations and ensuring accurate data capture.

about2.title: My experience
about2.description: I have worked on various fullstack projects...

project1.role: Full Stack Developer - Grocery Store Management System
project1.description: Developed my university capstone project: a comprehensive web application for grocery store management, featuring inventory and supplier tracking, and a point-of-sale system with automated receipt generation.
achievements: Implemented a secure login system with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to manage user permissions and actions.
Engineered an efficient backend using Node.js and MySQL, integrated with an intuitive and modern React frontend.
Focused on security best practices and the robust handling of sensitive data.

project2.description: Developed a mobile Pokedex application powered by the PokeApi, enabling users to search and explore detailed characteristics for every Pokemon.
achievements: Architected a robust integration with the PokeApi RESTful service, effectively managing complex loading states and error handling.
Designed a clean, optimized mobile interface focused on delivering a seamless and high-quality user experience.
Implemented real-time data filtering and normalization logic to ensure efficient data rendering.
